resources.string: Align the on-screen crosshair with the scope\'s crosshair, then fine-tune with the nudge buttons if needed
Tap the frame where the shot breaks (muzzle flash / smoke)

VTB estimates crosswind along a bullet\'s entire flight path from vapor-trail video, then computes the windage and elevation adjustment needed on the scope for the next shot. Mount the phone rigidly on the rifle, parallel to the scope and with its on-screen crosshair aligned to the scope\'s own crosshair, then record or import a video of the shot to analyze the trail.\n\nThis is a field-estimation tool for target shooting, not a certified ballistic solver — validate against real impacts before relying on it at distance.

Developed by RFSAT Limited (Research for Science, Art and Technology), a non-profit R&D SME based in Dublin, Ireland and Athens, Greece. RFSAT works across DSP, embedded systems, IoT sensing, and applied machine learning research, including contributions to the ENACT Horizon Europe programme.
